instruction:
Suppose a function $h$ is given by the following table of values.
$\begin{array}{cccccccc}\hline t=&-3 &-2 &-1 & 0 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\ \hline h(t)=&-2 &-2 &-1 &-4 &-1 & 0 & 0 \\ \hline \end{array}$
Use the table to fill in the missing values. There may be more than one correct answer, in which case you should enter your answers as a comma separated list. If there are no correct answers, enter NONE. $h \big($ [ANS] $\big)=2h(-2)$ $h \big($ [ANS] $\big)=2h(1)+h(-3)$ $h \big($ [ANS] $\big)=h(2)$ $h \big($ [ANS] $\big)=h(-1)+h(-3)$
